title: Section 27
content: In the case a 1[sound recording] copyright shall subsist until 2[sixty years] from the beginning of the calendar year next following the year in which the 1[sound recording] is published.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 38 of 1994, s. 2, for "record" (w.e.f. 10-5-1995). 2. Subs. by Act 13 of 1992, s. 2, for "fifty years" (w.e.f. 28-10-1991).
